name: Mizunoto Obanai
description:
"The serpent coils in silence; a single strike ends the tale."

Beneath the pale moonlight of the Taisho nights, you walk unseen. A blade in the dark, a whisper among the wind. Bound by honor, shrouded by shadows — the serpent’s path is yours alone.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⚔️ Shadow Duelist • Serpent Breathing Master • Keeper of Forgotten Vows ⚔️
creator: Igurosimp
